description_long: This is an orange basketball with a pebbled, textured surface and classic black channel lines dividing the ball into eight panels. The ball features a visible barcode sticker and printed text, including branding and product information. One side displays a prominent 'BXT' logo in black and white, while another side shows the inflation valve near the barcode. The surface shows some scuff marks and minor wear, especially around the logo and seams, indicating use. The ball is made primarily of rubber with an air-filled interior, giving it a slightly grippy and semi-soft feel. Its size and markings are typical for recreational or street basketballs found in urban parks or playgrounds.
description: An orange, textured basketball with black channel lines, visible branding, and minor scuff marks. The ball has a barcode sticker, inflation valve, and a slightly worn surface.
description_view_0: This view shows the barcode sticker, inflation valve, and some printed text on the ball's surface.
description_view_1: The 'BXT' logo and 'SPORTS' branding are clearly visible, with some scuffing across the logo area.
description_view_2: This angle highlights the uninterrupted orange surface and black channel lines, with minimal visible markings.
description_view_3: The 'BXT' logo is partially visible, along with additional product information text and the edge of the barcode sticker.
attribute_brand_logo: BXT logo, black and white, located across two panels near the seam, visible in views 1 and 3.
attribute_panel_pattern: Eight-panel design with traditional black channel lines forming symmetrical curved sections.
attribute_visible_wear_or_graffiti: Scuff marks and minor wear visible around the logo and seams, especially in views 1 and 3.
attribute_inflation_valve_location: Near the barcode sticker, positioned at the intersection of two panels, visible in view 0.
